description: You are an entrepreneur opening 'Spoke & Bean', a hybrid bicycle shop, mechanical repair bay, and community espresso bar. Transform the open-plan commercial unit in bike_shop_starter.sh3d into a functional mixed-use space. The design must feature at least 3 partition walls creating enclosed spaces for a Repair Workshop, Back Office, and Restrooms, with at least 3 doors for access. Define at least 4 room zones with descriptive names such as 'Retail Showroom', 'Cafe', 'Workshop', 'Office', and 'Restroom'. Furnish the Workshop with at least 2 workbenches, 3 storage units, and 1 sink; the Cafe with at least 1 service counter, 4 seating items, and 1 kitchen appliance; the Retail Showroom with at least 4 display units; and the Restrooms with at least 1 toilet and 1 sink. Include at least 2 dimension lines to document workspace clearances. Save the completed plan as 'bicycle_shop_result.sh3d' in ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/.
